raw_consumer_statement:
In XX/XX/XXXX I purchased a vacation package to be taken during the XXXX holiday from XX/XX/XXXX until XX/XX/XXXX, which included hotel stay and a round trip flight for my kids and I in XXXX. 
The payment was made in full via initial payment and monthly payments. However even though a flight to my destination was provided, a return flight ticket was never provided. 
I had to purchase a one way return ticket for my infant kids age XXXX and XXXX and myself on XX/XX/XXXX when our vacation was meant to be over and we needed to vacate the hotel and the country. 
I reached out to the merchant multiple times via calls, text, emails, XXXX message and even on social media, but didn't get a response and I decided to dispute the charges on my citi credit card. 
Despite citi opening the dispute and me providing all the requested document asked of me by citi card, all the merchant provided was a receipt of my payment and citi card decided I was responsible. 
I'm not denying making payments, I'm filling a dispute because even after making payments, my family and I were stuck in a hotel room in a foreign country without a return ticket which was meant to be provided. 
As of this writing, the merchant is yet to show the proof of a return ticket that was provided to me for my kids and I.
